name: Cache-blocked matrix multiply
task: Create /tmp/eval_gemm/gemm.py with gemm_blocked(A, B, block=32) computing C = A * B for two list-of-lists matrices. Use the canonical 6-loop cache-blocked GEMM (ii, jj, kk outer; i, k, j inner) for cache locality. The validator checks correctness against a naive triple-loop reference on a 64×64 matrix.
